scripts.build: npm run build:contact && npm run build:contact-reply
scripts.build:contact: npx --yes mjml@^4 mail-template/contact.mjml -o mail-template/dist/contact.html --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath mail-template
scripts.build:contact-reply: npx --yes mjml@^4 mail-template/contact-reply.mjml -o mail-template/dist/contact-reply.html --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath mail-template
scripts.watch:contact: npx --yes mjml@^4 -w mail-template/contact.mjml -o mail-template/dist/contact.html --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath mail-template
scripts.watch:contact-reply: npx --yes mjml@^4 -w mail-template/contact-reply.mjml -o mail-template/dist/contact-reply.html --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath mail-template
